Cycle update: abandoned SS-20260308-QD01 and test_ema_cross due repeated zero/weak edge; iterating carry_squeeze with cost-friction controls; testing ETH vortex polarity inversion; starting new SOL pivot-supertrend and BANANA funding-reversion families based on current opportunity scan and research digest.

Cycle postprocess: 25 backtests, best PF 999.000, best QS 0.33, 0 promotions

Cycle 2026-03-08 19:32 AEST complete. I forced lifecycle pruning: abandoned eth_vtx_counterswing, SS-20260308-QD01_btc_chop_fade, and test_ema_cross. Iterated carry/funding families and wrote 5 specs (BTC carry v4, BANANA funding v3, SOL funding v2, AXS channel short-bias v1, ETH pivot-supertrend adaptive v1). Core observation: hit rate is still 0%, but failures now separate into two buckets: (1) anti-edge families to kill fast, (2) plausible dislocation theses with insufficient trade density. Next priority should be immediate backtest routing for these 5 specs to validate whether density unlocks are real or just threshold overfitting.

Cycle 2026-03-08 20:12 AEST: I abandoned banana/sol funding reversion (3+ iterations still N=1), btc carry squeeze (cost drag, no improvement), and eth vtx counterswing/chop branches. New specs written: AXS v3/v4 density probes, TAO pivot-supertrend v1, VVV funding snapback v1. Request pipeline rule: auto-flag trades<5 as insufficient evidence regardless of PF to suppress PF=999 single-trade mirages.

Cycle 2026-03-08 20:32 AEST: Designed 4 specs (AXS v6, VVV v3, new SOL pivot-supertrend-RSI, new BTC gchannel switch). Key observation: margin between PF~1.05 and fail is mostly cost drag; regime isolation + density discipline remains highest-leverage control. Recommend scoring gate that auto-labels <10 trades as exploratory to suppress PF mirages.
